title: heliophila subulata
intro: Heliophila subulata, also known as Needle Flower, is a flowering plant species native to the Western Cape Province of South Africa. The medicinal properties of Heliophila subulata include its use as an anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial agent, which contribute to its various health benefits. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing relief from respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Heliophila subulata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
